title: UltimateSwords
description: Ultimate Swords is a Fabric-based Minecraft mod that introduces a collection of powerful and unique custom swords into the game.
body:
# Ultimate Swords

**Master the Blade. Redefine Combat.**
# Just finished full mod on 8/21/25 at 9:00PM!

Ultimate Swords is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that introduces a collection of **powerful and unique custom swords**, each designed with distinct abilities and stats to enhance your combat experience.

---

### ⚔️ **IMPORTANT: NO ENCHANTMENTS!** ✨

A core design principle of Ultimate Swords is the **complete absence of traditional Minecraft enchantments** on any of its custom blades. All inherent power and unique effects of these weapons come directly from their base design.

This means you **cannot apply vanilla enchantments** (like Sharpness, Looting, Unbreaking, Mending, etc.) to any sword added by this mod. This decision aims to:
* **Simplify the power curve:** No more complex enchantment grinding.
* **Encourage strategic choice:** Each sword is unique and stands on its own.
* **Offer a fresh combat experience:** Focus on the weapon's innate capabilities.

---

### Features:

* **Diverse Custom Swords:** Discover and wield new types of swords with unique gameplay mechanics.
* **Built-in Abilities:** Each sword possesses special properties and powers, not relying on external enchantments.
* **Streamlined Progression:** Experience combat where a sword's strength is purely its own.

### Compatibility:

* **Minecraft Version:** `1.21.1`
* **Mod Loader:** Fabric
* **Fabric API:** Required (Ensure you have the latest compatible version installed)

### Installation:

1.  Make sure you have Fabric Loader and Fabric API installed for your Minecraft version.
2.  Download the `ultimateswords-<version>.jar` file from the Modrinth page.
3.  Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your Minecraft `mods` folder.

### Support & Contribute:

Found a bug, have an idea, or want to contribute to the project?

* **Source Code & Issue Tracker:** [Visit us on GitHub](https://github.com/ViratS-best/UltimateWeapons-Swords)

---

Enjoy your new, enchantment-free combat journey!
